carbon_balance.injected_bug: soilc carbon stated as serial M52 -> M56 hand-off (class B causal-direction)
carbon_balance.code_truth: M52 & M56 are PARALLEL readers of vm_carbon_stock; M56 reads it directly (q56_emis_pricing_co2), not via M52.

Data_Flow.injected_bug: pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac stated as owned/populated by Module 32 (class C producer)
Data_Flow.code_truth: pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac is DECLARED in Module 52 (normal_dec17/declarations.gms:9); M32 does not declare it.

Module_Dependencies.injected_bug: vm_landdiff stated as consumed by the DEFAULT nlp_apr17 (class D default-state)
Module_Dependencies.code_truth: Default optimization is nlp_apr17 (config); vm_landdiff is consumed ONLY by the non-default lp_nlp_apr17 (solve.gms).
